title: Gary airport positioned to benefit from Bears stadium in Indiana, officials say
description:
Gary officials think the city’s airport would see a boost in traffic if neighboring Hammond lands a $2 billion Chicago Bears stadium being considered for a site near Wolf Lake.

description:

title: Indianapolis nonprofit’s ‘strategic realignment’ to affect 85 employees
description:

description:

title: Purdue board approves elevating Lilly research center
description:
The university’s board of trustees on Friday approved elevating the Eli Lilly and Company and Purdue University Research Alliance Center and renaming it the Lilly Purdue Innovation Institute.
